description: Configure Stellarium for a behavioral biology paper simulating the night sky for nocturnally migrating birds at High Island bird sanctuary, Texas (29.5833° N, 94.3833° W, 5m). Set the simulation to May 1, 2024, at 05:00 UTC. The display must show a 'pure' star compass view with atmosphere and ground disabled, while constellation lines, constellation boundaries, and the equatorial coordinate grid are enabled. Center the view on Polaris and save a screenshot to ~/Pictures/stellarium/. Document the observation in a research note at ~/Desktop/avian_navigation_notes.txt including the location ('High Island'), the central reference star ('Polaris'), the date ('May 1, 2024'), and the use of 'boundaries' as a visual field reference.
